svg.text: Real RoboTwin sample + precomputed FastWAM T5 text cache on AGX Orin
FP16 TensorRT real-text: mean 134.57 ms / p95 134.69 ms · eager .pth real-text: 323.97 ms e2e, 316.50 ms policy · speedup 2.41x
text_context = precomputed_t5_cache; task = “Lift the bottle with narrow top head-up from the table”
precomputed T5 context [1,128,4096] + proprio token -> deploy context [1,129,4096]
text encoder is outside TensorRT; cache tensor is bound to video/action engine inputs
repeat denoising steps when num_inference_steps > 1; current measured baseline uses 1 step
Deployment contract: static batch=1 · RoboTwin 3-camera composite · action horizon=32 · action_dim=14 · output finite=True
Text cache is real and precomputed; T5 encoder is not resident in the TensorRT runtime.
Drift gate: 15 tensors compared, all finite=True; worst max_abs=115.629 in selected video K/V
action_decoded max_abs=1.598, mean_abs=0.277; first_frame_latents mean_abs=0.725. Runtime-valid; accuracy/sim validation pending.
Real precomputed T5 context + proprio slot
Figure: Data transfer and measured latency among the five modules in the current FastWAM real-text partitioned runtime.
